title: taraxacum fulvescens
intro: Taraxacum fulvescens, also known as the yellow dandelion or western dandelion, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to western North America. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to support liver and digestive health. The health benefits of Taraxacum fulvescens include reducing the risk of certain cancers, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Taraxacum fulvescens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
